question: Tom has 3 apples and buys 2 more. How many apples does he have now?
Maria gives 4 pencils to Luis and has 6 left. How many pencils did Maria have at first?
A bakery sold 12 muffins in the morning and 8 more after lunch. How many muffins did it sell?
Noah had 15 marbles and lost 7 marbles. How many marbles are left?
Chen reads 5 pages on Monday and 9 pages on Tuesday. How many more pages did Chen read on Tuesday?
